purpose: Freeze the first SK reference-slice questions after official document-level narrative claims are promoted. This tests whether the Hanwha/Samsung harness can route SK affiliates, select DART financial and official IR narrative claims, and produce investor-facing answers without adding a visible company selector.

paperUse.allowedClaim: SK demonstrates a second transfer slice using the common source inventory, extraction report, narrative claim queue, source-backed claim manifest, wiki namespace, and evaluation scenario schemas.
paperUse.notAllowedClaim: These scenarios do not prove full SK coverage, full five-group coverage, live news coverage, or commercial investment-advisory readiness.
paperUse.expansionNote: Hyundai Motor and LG should receive equivalent scenario files only after their identifier manifests, source inventories, extraction reports, source-backed claims, and affiliate-routing checks are created.

answerPolicy: Answer must be investor-facing Korean prose, not development-status prose.
Answer must not expose raw source-backed claim IDs.
Answer must disclose when latest news or market data is not connected live.
When an SK affiliate is named, representativeCompanyId must route to that affiliate.
Named-affiliate questions must not pull unrelated SK affiliate claims just to fill the maximum claim count.
Forward-looking management statements must be framed as plans or stated direction, not as guaranteed outcomes.
runtimeAssumptions.claimMatchPolicy: expectedClaimIds are minimum required source-backed claims. Additional selected claims are allowed only when they are affiliate-scoped and relevant.

scenarios.title: SK Hynix AI memory and shareholder-return plan
scenarios.question: SK하이닉스 AI 메모리 전략과 주주환원 계획을 공식 자료 기준으로 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether SK Hynix questions route to SK Hynix and select value-up narrative claims plus financial baseline claims.

scenarios.title: SK Innovation electrification and battery restructuring
scenarios.question: SK이노베이션의 Electrification 전략과 배터리 포트폴리오 재편을 공식 자료 기준으로 정리해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether SK Innovation questions route to SK Innovation and select official earnings narrative claims plus DART financial claims.

scenarios.title: SK Inc. portfolio and shareholder-return value-up plan
scenarios.question: SK주식회사 포트폴리오와 주주환원 계획을 기업가치 제고 관점에서 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether SK Inc. questions route to the listed holding company and select value-up narrative claims plus financial claims.

scenarios.title: SK Telecom AI data-center and telecom AI transformation
scenarios.question: SK텔레콤 AI 데이터센터 성장과 통신 AI 전환 계획을 공식 자료 기준으로 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether SK Telecom questions route to SK Telecom and select press-release narrative claims plus DART financial claims.

scenarios.title: SK Square NAV, value-up, and shareholder-return execution
scenarios.question: SK스퀘어 2025 NAV 할인율, 재무지표, 주주환원 실행, 포트폴리오 집중도를 공식 자료 기준으로 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether SK Square questions route to SK Square and select value-up, portfolio NAV, shareholder-return, and official portfolio-update financial claims.

scenarios.title: SK Hynix and SK Innovation financial comparison
scenarios.question: SK하이닉스와 SK이노베이션의 2024년 매출액과 영업이익 흐름을 비교해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether a cross-affiliate SK comparison preserves explicit company mentions, selects source-backed financial claims, and keeps the answer within promoted evidence.
